column1: "Don't go there by car" - Mrs Taylor_________her husband not to go there by car.
“My nephew is a very capable young man,” - The woman says that _______nephew is a very capable young man.
“Sit still and don’t move your head,” - The doctor tells me to sit still and not to move_________head.
"Invite all your friends to the party" - My mother tells me_________all my friends to the party.
“Don’t forget to bring your exercise books tomorrow,”  - The teacher tells  us _______ to bring our exercise books tomorrow.
“When does your mother go shopping?” - The neighbour__________when my mother go shopping.
“I like music.” - Nina says that she___________music.
“Don’t go out before I return.” - Mother tells us not to go out before_________return.
"Why do they come late?" - My grandmother asks why________they come late.
“I am very happy,” - Fred says that__________ is very happy.
“Please don’t take the books from my table,” - Lena tells me ______ the books from her table.
“Don’t be afraid, Nick,” - His father tells Nick ________to be afraid.
